name: Fractional HSE Director
subtitle: Strategic HSE leadership without the full-time cost
description: Dedicated advisory days per month, leadership team engagement, board reporting, and full accountability for HSE performance.

name: Monthly HSE Retainer
subtitle: Ongoing advisory and support on a retained basis
description: Providing consistent, expert input for organisations that need regular but not full-time HSE guidance.

name: Project-Embedded HSE Lead
subtitle: Dedicated on-site or remote HSE leadership for a specific project
description: Construction, commissioning, turnaround, or major capital project — from mobilisation to handover.

name: Corporate HSE Partner Program
subtitle: Long-term strategic partnership delivering all four pillars
description: Consulting, training, digital, and AI — as a unified service. The most comprehensive engagement model available.
